## Who is Abdul Rahman Azam?

Abdul Rahman Azam is a Full Stack AI Engineer from Karachi, Pakistan. He specializes in building AI-powered web applications that combine machine learning models with modern full-stack development using React, Node.js, Python, and FastAPI. Abdul Rahman is currently pursuing a Bachelor of Science in Artificial Intelligence at FAST NUCES Karachi (National University of Computer and Emerging Sciences) with a CGPA of 3.33.

## Professional Summary

- Full name: Abdul Rahman Azam
- Title: Full Stack AI Engineer
- Location: Karachi, Sindh, Pakistan
- University: FAST NUCES Karachi (BS in Artificial Intelligence, 2021–present)
- Website: https://abdulrahmanazam.me
- Email: azamabdulrahman930@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/abdulrahmanazam
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/abdulrahmanazam

## Technical Skills

Web Development: React.js, Node.js, Express.js, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, PostgreSQL, REST APIs
AI/ML & Data Science: Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy, Data Visualization, FastAPI

## Key Projects

1. University Resource Sharing Platform (Jan–May 2025): Full-stack platform for FAST NUCES students built with React, Node.js, PostgreSQL. Features role-based authentication and scalable relational database architecture.
2. Super Tic-Tac-Toe AI Game (Apr–May 2025): Web-based 9×9 Super Tic-Tac-Toe with Minimax and Alpha-Beta Pruning. Complex multi-board game-state evaluation.
3. Income Prediction System (Sep–Dec 2024): ML system achieving 85% accuracy on 32,000+ census records using Gradient Boosting. Deployed with FastAPI backend and React analytics dashboard.
4. 2D Action Platformer Game (Feb–May 2024): High-performance game in C++ ranked in top 1% of university projects for creativity.
5. Unbeatable Tic-Tac-Toe AI (Sep–Dec 2023): Provably optimal Minimax strategy in C with 100% win rate against human players.

## Achievements

- Solved 290+ LeetCode problems with 6 skill badges
- 2nd Place in FAST Web Hunt Competition
- 3rd Place in ACM Coders Cup
- HackerRank Problem Solving: Basic & Intermediate certifications
- ChatGPT for Everyone certification (Learn Prompting)
- Matric with 98.12% from Happy Palace School, Karachi
